segments.text: I thought trading was just a game But in every candle I saw the world
The economy It's a battlefield
I scroll through charts like books of faith Each impulse tracking herbs in my state
The mark of whispered I ignored the call Till I saw the blood behind numbers wall
The world thrives on quotes and borrow claims Stakes run higher than life's twisted games
People seek purpose I chase the trend With time shadows confidence in the end
I enter the matrix no turn In back it's not money but I these that crack
Every rise and fall is where I stand I'm alive when I see that life first hand
Don't pay tricks no turn In back it's not money but I these that crack
Every rise and fall is where I stand I'm alive when I see that life first hand
I look past prices into the crowd's deep fears Who holds the line who runs from tears
The world's not driven by oil or gold bro But belief tomorrow won't break the load
They chase the line Forget their core But I learn entries not where arrow saw
Entries where the heartbeat stays calm and steady No randomness with pain stays ready
For family I grind, health keeps me whole Resilience turns losses into control
I enter the matrix no turn In back it's not money but I these that crack
Every rise and fall is where I stand I'm alive when I see that life first hand
I'm there tricks no turn In back it's not money but I these that crack
Every rise and fall is where I stand I'm alive when I see that life first hand
In a digest driven world fill and keeps you alive When charts collapse
Heart helps you survive I read the market like God's hand writing each candle my road
My soul igniting I don't hunt signals I build a new every minus a step
To a clear review I'm in the matrix but not system chain part of the flow
Playing my own game, health fuels the fight Families the wild resilience rebuilds when markets run dry
Listen, life's just another trade order Enter through pain exit with honor
I lose big others claim to find all insicles like charts in the twine
I'm not just a trader I chronicle the beat Lincoln air is in gains in the heat
The matrix whispers truth to the bold Who live in the space where systems unfold
I'm alive when I see that life first hand
I'm alive when I see that life first hand
